title: Add the new model.Component examples into the buildScripts/webpack/json/build.json
component.Base: destroy() => destroy the model instance, in case it does exist
component.Base: destroy() => destroy the controller instance, in case it does exist
examples.model.nestedData.MainContainer: add a button to log the model instance into the console
examples.model.advanced.MainContainer: add buttons to log the model instances into the console
examples.model.extendedClass.MainContainer: add a button to log the model instance into the console
examples.model.inline.MainContainer: add a button to log the model instance into the console
model.Component: setData() => add support for nested properties
model.Component: getData() => use the new getParentDataScope() helper method
model.Component: createBinding() => add support for nested data keys
model.Component: getData() => add support for nested properties
model.Component: setData() => create a new data property in case no match is found inside the parent chain
manager.Component: down() => support passing component instances
util.ClassSystem: beforeSetInstance() => add support for string based DefaultClass param values
